texto: Being a reader has brought me much joy, laughter, and rich experience. But reading has also wounded me. The sacrament of reading has plowed me open and sown seeds of empathy that have taken root in deep soil. Over the years, reading has caused me to grow from a shallow, self-absorbed youth to one who seeks out the pain of the world. Reading has burdened me with the welfare of my fellow human, but sometimes the burden proves too heavy for my narrow shoulders.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Steve Kendall sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “Being a reader has brought me much joy, laughter, and rich experience. But reading has also wound…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a humor, growth, life-lessons, útil em momentos de life-lessons e maturity.
